personality_one_liner: A premium, modern, and trustworthy educational experience built on structure, clarity, and the brand's tri-color heritage.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room for content digestion. Generous safe-area margins. Use 'md' or 'lg' gaps for grids, no tight spacing.

do's: Use blur on bottom tab bar when content scrolls behind it
Use frosted glass on the floating action button or primary sticky CTA container
Apply glass effects on bottom sheet headers and modal scrims
dont's: Do not use glassmorphism on regular list items or course cards
Do not use blur on input fields or static text backgrounds

screens.name: Auth (Login / Register)
screens.purpose: A premium entry point allowing multi-role access.

states.error: Toast or inline text above the submit button with 'error' color.

screens.layout: Top-aligned logo (large). Generous '2xl' spacing. Input fields with labels above (no floating labels). A prominent sticky 'brandPrimary' CTA button. Secondary actions (Forgot password) in 'brandSecondary' text.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Discover courses, view upcoming live classes, and understand the platform's value.

states.loading: Skeleton UI for course cards and banners.
states.empty: Illustration with 'No courses available right now'.
states.error: Readable message with a 'Retry' button in the center.

screens.layout: AppHeader with Logo. HeroBanner using full-width card with image overlay (gradient scrim + text). Horizontal sticky CategoryChip row. Horizontal scrolling Featured Courses (Cards width 80% to peek the next). Vertical list for Popular courses.

screens.name: Courses (Catalog)
screens.purpose: Browse, search, and filter the complete course library.

states.empty: Illustration showing 'No courses found' with clear search term.

screens.layout: Sticky search bar at the top (with glassmorphism). Filter pills below it. 2-column grid for courses. CourseCard: Thumbnail (with gradient scrim if text overlays), Title, Instructor, Rating, Price.

screens.name: Course Detail & Enrollment
screens.purpose: Persuade the student to enroll and clearly lay out syllabus.
screens.layout: Hero image at top, title/rating below. Segmented control for (About, Syllabus, Reviews). Sticky primary CTA at the bottom ('Enroll Now' / 'Pay') over a glass container.

screens.name: Payment (Razorpay + Manual UPI)
screens.purpose: Frictionless checkout with clear manual upload flow.

states.error: Red error toast or card indicating 'Payment Failed' / 'Upload Error'.

screens.layout: Order summary card at the top. Radio select for (Razorpay, UPI Manual). If UPI Manual: Show PhonePe QR prominently. Below QR, show UTR input field and a large dashed tap-to-upload area for receipt. Submit button sticky at bottom.

screens.name: My Study Dashboard
screens.purpose: Central hub for the student's active learning journey.

states.empty: Friendly 'You haven't started any courses yet' illustration with a CTA to browse.

screens.layout: Top scrolling tab bar (Courses, Live, Recordings, Notes, Tests, Exams, Certificates). Content renders as stacked vertical cards depending on the tab. Live Class tab features a card with a distinct 'Join on MS Teams' CTA (brandPrimary or success color).

screens.name: Teacher / Admin Panels
screens.purpose: Manage users, courses, payments, and content uploads.

states.empty: No pending tasks or users found.

screens.layout: Drawer or Stack navigation (different from Student bottom tabs). Dense list rows with clear actions (Approve, Reject, Upload). Statistics/Analytics rendered as summary cards at the top.

screens.name: Exam / Test Player
screens.purpose: Focus-oriented environment for taking timed assessments.
screens.layout: Header with sticky countdown timer. Large typography for questions. Distinct radio buttons/checkboxes. For subjective: large text area and 'Upload File' button. Sticky 'Next' / 'Submit' button at bottom.

logo.alt: M SQURE TECH & WELFARE FOUNDATION Logo

hero_banner_student.alt: Indian student using laptop for online education

live_class_empty.alt: Student attending an online class on a laptop

instructions_to_main_agent: Use the exact logo colors mapped into the UI tokens: Saffron as `brandSecondary` (#FF8A1E) for badges/accents, Deep Blue as `brandPrimary` (#1B2A6E) for primary buttons/headers, and Green as `success` (#2EA84B).
Font requirement: `Plus Jakarta Sans` for Display/Headings and `DM Sans` for body/text. Load via expo-font with Google Fonts CSS CDN or @react-native-fonts. Do not use Inter or Roboto.
Implement the layout as 1 iOS-Native Clean: generous padding, pill or rounded rectangle shapes, clear hierarchy, and elevated cards with shadow_tier 1.
For the Manual UPI Upload flow, clearly present the uploaded 'upi_qr' image, followed by a 'UTR' input field, and a tap-to-upload dashed container for the receipt.
The Student role uses Bottom Tabs (Home, Browse, My Study, Profile). All administrative roles (Teacher, Admin, Super Admin) must use Stacked navigation with a Drawer layout.
Always apply a dark-to-transparent vertical gradient scrim over the 'hero_banner_student' or course thumbnails if text is overlaid, ensuring WCAG AA readability.
Include the Microsoft Teams join link prominently in the Live Classes card UI, styled as a high-contrast button.
Ensure all interactive CTAs use a sticky container at the bottom over scrolling content, applying a glassmorphism blur effect where applicable (refer to glassmorphism rules).
